label: 565_mpc_andrew bailey_huw pill_huw
description: The Bank of England's Governor Andrew Bailey and Chief Economist Huw Pill discuss inflation targets and the UK economy. They address energy price shocks and their impact on real incomes, emphasizing the central bank's role in stabilizing economic conditions.

central_articles.title: Andrew Bailey: Remaining anchored - monetary policy in an unpredictable world
central_articles.excerpt: For net importers of energy like the UK, the terms of trade have worsened and real incomes will fall. The shock will push up inflation, and weigh on activity.
